ASTROLUPINE-READ.title: Read
ASTROLUPINE-READ.description: The value of this card additionally scales with the current stacks of the target register (This effect is unaffected by any debuffs).
ASTROLUPINE-WRITE.title: Write
ASTROLUPINE-WRITE.description: When played, set the target register's stacks to this card's value.
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_REGISTER.title: Attack Register
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_REGISTER.description: Can be [Read] and [Written] to, affecting the effect of some cards.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_REGISTER.title: Defense Register
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_REGISTER.description: Can be [Read] and [Written] to, affecting the effect of some cards.
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_REGISTER.title: Draw Register
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_REGISTER.description: Can be [Read] and [Written] to, affecting the effect of some cards.
ASTROLUPINE-TROJAN_HORSE_VIRUS.title: Trojan Horse Virus
ASTROLUPINE-TROJAN_HORSE_VIRUS.descripti: At the start of its turn, takes damage equal to the player's [Attack Register] value.
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_EXPLOIT.title: Zero-Day Exploit
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_EXPLOIT.description: Cannot gain Block while having this status.
ASTROLUPINE-AUTO_MAINTENANCE.title: Auto Maintenance
ASTROLUPINE-AUTO_MAINTENANCE.description: At the start of your turn, gain Block equal to the current [Defense Register] value.
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_ACCUMULATOR.title: Attack Accumulator
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_ACCUMULATOR.descripti: At the start of your turn, the [Attack Register] automatically increments.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_ACCUMULATOR.title: Defense Accumulator
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_ACCUMULATOR.descript: At the start of your turn, the [Defense Register] automatically increments.
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_OVERWRITE.title: Attack Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_OVERWRITE.description: At the start of next turn, forcefully sets the [Attack Register] value to the specified amount.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_OVERWRITE.title: Defense Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_OVERWRITE.descriptio: At the start of next turn, forcefully sets the [Defense Register] value to the specified amount.
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_OVERWRITE.title: Draw Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_OVERWRITE.description: At the start of next turn, forcefully sets the [Draw Register] value to the specified amount.
ASTROLUPINE-OVERWRITE.title: Overwrite Effect
ASTROLUPINE-OVERWRITE.description: Includes Attack Overwrite, Defense Overwrite, and Draw Overwrite.
